title: Recorded Blender-MCP mutating calls violated the stateless saved-blend chaining contract
description: Remediate EXEC-BLENDER-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Before escalating a Blender-MCP defect, prove one correct chain: `project_initialize(output_blend=...)`, then a mutating follow-up that reuses the returned `persistence.saved_blend` as `input_blend`, and verify `.blender-mcp/audit/*.jsonl` records non-null `input_blend` / `output_blend` on the matching `job_start`.
summary: Before escalating a Blender-MCP defect, prove one correct chain: `project_initialize(output_blend=...)`, then a mutating follow-up that reuses the returned `persistence.saved_blend` as `input_blend`, and verify `.blender-mcp/audit/*.jsonl` records non-null `input_blend` / `output_blend` on the matching `job_start`.

title: The supplied session transcript shows the agent searching for workflow bypasses or soft dependency overrides instead of following the lifecycle contract
description: Remediate SESSION003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Reject unsupported stages and dependency overrides up front, tell the coordinator not to probe alternate transitions or close blocked tickets anyway, and return the contract contradiction as a blocker when the required proof is missing.
summary: Reject unsupported stages and dependency overrides up front, tell the coordinator not to probe alternate transitions or close blocked tickets anyway, and return the contract contradiction as a blocker when the required proof is missing.

title: blender_agent is disabled even though the current asset route requires Blender-MCP
description: Remediate CONFIG012 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Enable blender_agent only when the inferred asset route requires Blender-MCP and the host exposes the required Blender MCP paths.
summary: Enable blender_agent only when the inferred asset route requires Blender-MCP and the host exposes the required Blender MCP paths.

title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text or stale synthesized guidance instead of current project-specific procedure
description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Populate every required repo-local skill with concrete current rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler or stale synthesized workflow guidance.
summary: Populate every required repo-local skill with concrete current rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler or stale synthesized workflow guidance.
